name: Sunset Punch
description: A bright house cocktail with aged rum, passion fruit, lime, toasted pineapple and a sea-salt finish.

name: Black Swell Negroni
description: Gin, vermouth, bitter orange and cold brew reduction for a darker late-night classic.

name: Crispy Calamari
description: Lightly fried calamari with lemon aioli, smoked paprika and fresh herbs.

name: Tuna Tostadas
description: Fresh tuna, avocado cream, sesame, citrus ponzu and crisp corn tostadas.

name: Reef Grilled Fish
description: Charred catch of the day with coconut rice, grilled vegetables and herb vinaigrette.

name: Short Rib Gnocchi
description: Potato gnocchi, slow-braised short rib, parmesan, basil and red wine jus.

name: Seventy Smash Burger
description: Double smash patty, cheddar, pickles, caramelized onion and house beach sauce.

name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich
description: Marinated chicken, slaw, pepper jack, lime mayo and toasted brioche.

name: Coconut Panna Cotta
description: Silky coconut cream, mango, toasted cashew and lime zest.

name: Chocolate Rum Tart
description: Dark chocolate ganache, rum caramel, cocoa crumble and vanilla cream.
